title: CNN GRU Attention with Noise and Time Warp Augmentation plus Feature Fusion
hypothesis_text: Applying the successful noise+time_warp augmentation from exp6 to the cnn_gru_attention model, while adding a learnable feature fusion layer to incorporate handcrafted powerful features, will improve accuracy beyond the current best result of 0.3566.

based_on_experiments.observation: simple_cnn with noise+time_warp augmentation achieved 0.3566 accuracy, showing augmentation significantly boosts deep_raw models
cnn_gru_attention achieved 0.3085 accuracy without augmentation, indicating strong architecture potential
svm_linear achieved 0.3524 accuracy on powerful features, showing handcrafted features contain valuable information

based_on_papers.insight_used: Multi-head attention mechanisms can effectively combine different feature representations

based_on_papers.paper_title: Deep Learning for Electromyographic Hand Gesture Signal Classification Using Transfer Learning
based_on_papers.insight_used: Feature fusion between raw EMG and handcrafted features improves gesture recognition accuracy

proposed_changes.training_modifications: Add a learnable fusion layer after the attention mechanism to incorporate powerful handcrafted features (from ml_emg_td pipeline) as auxiliary input, with dropout increased to 0.3 for regularization

expected_effect: Accuracy improvement to 0.37-0.39 range by combining the architectural advantages of cnn_gru_attention with proven augmentation and complementary feature information from handcrafted features
novelty_explanation: This hypothesis combines three successful elements from different experiments: 1) the augmentation strategy from exp6, 2) the cnn_gru_attention architecture which showed promise without augmentation, and 3) a novel feature fusion approach that addresses the gap where traditional ML excels on handcrafted features while deep learning excels on raw data.
